name: Azure Landing Zone Foundation
strategicIntent: Establish a standardised Azure landing zone for all workloads.
problemStatement: Inconsistent Azure subscriptions lead to governance gaps and cost overruns.
securityConsiderations: All subscriptions must be under management group hierarchy

guardrails.rule: All subscriptions must have cost alerts

exceptionProcess: Contact Cloud Platform team for variance review.
diagramSvg:
<svg width="900" height="600" viewBox="0 0 900 600" font-family="system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <defs>
    <marker id="arrow" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1B3A6B"/>
    </marker>
    <marker id="arrow-teal" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#0F6E56"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>

  <!-- Background -->
  <rect width="900" height="600" fill="#EAF1FB"/>

  <!-- Title Bar -->
  <rect width="900" height="64" fill="#1B3A6B" rx="0"/>
  <text x="32" y="28" fill="white" font-size="18" font-weight="700">Azure Landing Zone Foundation</text>
  <text x="32" y="50" fill="#93b4d8" font-size="12">Cloud & Platform · Tier 2 — Logical · Establish a standardised Azure landing zone for all workloads</text>

  <!-- Step 1 label -->
  <text x="200" y="155" fill="#64748b" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">Step 1: Request landing zone via portal</text>

  <!-- User / Portal box -->
  <rect x="80" y="165" width="240" height="64" rx="8" fill="white" stroke="#1B3A6B" stroke-width="2"/>
  <text x="200" y="193" fill="#1B3A6B" font-size="13" font-weight="700" text-anchor="middle">User Portal</text>
  <text x="200" y="213" fill="#64748b" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">Landing zone request</text>

  <!-- Arrow: Portal → Management Groups -->
  <line x1="200" y1="229" x2="200" y2="295" stroke="#1B3A6B" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)"/>

  <!-- Step 2 label -->
  <text x="200" y="285" fill="#64748b" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">Step 2: Platform team provisions</text>

  <!-- Azure Management Groups -->
  <rect x="80" y="300" width="240" height="64" rx="8" fill="#E8F5F0" stroke="#0F6E56" stroke-width="2"/>
  <text x="200" y="328" fill="#0F6E56" font-size="13" font-weight="700" text-anchor="middle">Azure Management Groups</text>
  <text x="200" y="348" fill="#64748b" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">Hierarchy & governance</text>

  <!-- Arrow: Management Groups → Policy -->
  <line x1="320" y1="332" x2="420" y2="332" stroke="#0F6E56" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow-teal)"/>
  <text x="370" y="322" fill="#64748b" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">applies</text>

  <!-- Azure Policy -->
  <rect x="420" y="300" width="240" height="64" rx="8" fill="#E8F5F0" stroke="#0F6E56" stroke-width="2"/>
  <text x="540" y="328" fill="#0F6E56" font-size="13" font-weight="700" text-anchor="middle">Azure Policy</text>
  <text x="540" y="348" fill="#64748b" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">Compliance & enforcement</text>

  <!-- Arrow: Management Groups down to Subscription -->
  <line x1="200" y1="364" x2="200" y2="430" stroke="#1B3A6B" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)"/>

  <!-- Subscription box -->
  <rect x="80" y="430" width="240" height="64" rx="8" fill="white" stroke="#BA7517" stroke-width="2"/>
  <text x="200" y="458" fill="#BA7517" font-size="13" font-weight="700" text-anchor="middle">Azure Subscription</text>
  <text x="200" y="478" fill="#64748b" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">Provisioned workload scope</text>

  <!-- Arrow: Policy → Subscription -->
  <line x1="540" y1="364" x2="540" y2="462" stroke="#0F6E56" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="5,3" marker-end="url(#arrow-teal)"/>
  <line x1="540" y1="462" x2="320" y2="462" stroke="#0F6E56" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="5,3" marker-end="url(#arrow-teal)"/>

  <!-- Related Patterns Section -->
  <rect x="620" y="160" width="240" height="80" rx="8" fill="white" stroke="#BA7517" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="6,3"/>
  <text x="740" y="185" fill="#BA7517" font-size="11" font-weight="700" text-anchor="middle">RELATED PATTERN</text>
  <text x="740" y="207" fill="#1B3A6B" font-size="12" font-weight="600" text-anchor="middle">NW-001</text>
  <text x="740" y="225" fill="#64748b" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">Hub-Spoke Network Topology</text>

  <!-- Uses label -->
  <text x="740" y="252" fill="#64748b" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">Uses ↑</text>

  <!-- Legend -->
  <rect x="620" y="430" width="240" height="100" rx="8" fill="white" stroke="#64748b" stroke-width="1"/>
  <text x="740" y="452" fill="#1B3A6B" font-size="11" font-weight="700" text-anchor="middle">Legend</text>
  <line x1="640" y1="468" x2="680" y2="468" stroke="#1B3A6B" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)"/>
  <text x="690" y="472" fill="#64748b" font-size="11">Flow step</text>
  <line x1="640" y1="490" x2="680" y2="490" stroke="#0F6E56" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="5,3" marker-end="url(#arrow-teal)"/>
  <text x="690" y="494" fill="#64748b" font-size="11">Policy applies</text>
  <rect x="640" y="505" width="18" height="12" rx="3" fill="#E8F5F0" stroke="#0F6E56" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <text x="665" y="516" fill="#64748b" font-size="11">Governance component</text>
</svg>
